parameters.query:
SELECT id, signal_type, company_id, severity, confidence, title, summary, evidence_urls, meta, created_at
FROM control_plane.signals
WHERE created_at >= '{{ $json.lookback_date }}'::date
ORDER BY severity DESC, created_at DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT content_json, content_md
FROM gtm_artifacts.objection_library_versions
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT content_json, content_md
FROM gtm_artifacts.swipe_file_versions
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT competitor_name, content_json
FROM gtm_artifacts.battlecard_versions
WHERE (competitor_name, created_at) IN (
  SELECT competitor_name, MAX(created_at)
  FROM gtm_artifacts.battlecard_versions
  GROUP BY competitor_name
)
ORDER BY competitor_name;

INSERT INTO gtm_artifacts.maturity_model_versions (
  week_start, week_end, content_json, content_md, included_signal_ids, dimension_count
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.month_start }}'::date,
  '{{ $json.month_end }}'::date,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.content).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.markdown.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.signal_ids) }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.dimension_count }}
)
ON CONFLICT (week_start, week_end) DO UPDATE SET
  content_json = EXCLUDED.content_json,
  content_md = EXCLUDED.content_md,
  included_signal_ids = EXCLUDED.included_signal_ids,
  dimension_count = EXCLUDED.dimension_count
RETURNING id;
